items.title: Vivo TWS 5i Launched With 10mm Dynamic Drivers, Up to 50 Hours of Total Battery Life: Price, Features
items.summary: Vivo TWS 5i has launched in China as an affordable pair of true wireless earbuds with a 10mm dynamic driver and DeepX 3.0 stereo sound. It supports spatial audio, Bluetooth 5.4...

items.title: Drizzle on top: a new high-end dog food brand is coming for the 1%
items.summary: Golden Child is launching with two "five-star" products: a fresh frozen meal system and, more intriguingly, a "drizzle." It has also raised $37 million in funding.
